# The Partnership Tree

> An AI-powered life sciences partner network connecting pharmaceutical, biotech and medtech companies with specialist service providers, CDMOs, CROs, and technology partners.

The Partnership Tree (thepartnershiptree.com) is operated by The Pharma Services Directory, established in 2003. It is one of the longest-running partner intelligence platforms in the life sciences industry.

## What The Partnership Tree Does

The Partnership Tree helps life sciences companies find, evaluate and connect with the right partners across the drug development and commercialisation lifecycle. It combines a curated directory of vetted service providers with AI-powered search and live partnership intelligence.

## Who It Serves

- Pharmaceutical companies seeking CDMOs, CROs, and development partners
- Biotech and medtech companies looking for specialist service providers
- Life sciences executives responsible for business development and partnering
- Companies seeking licensing, co-development, or commercial partnerships

## Core Services

- AI-powered partner search across 100+ vetted life sciences companies
- Curated directory of CDMOs, CROs, regulatory consultancies, and technology platforms
- Network News: live partnership deal tracking across the life sciences sector
- Profile Engagement Scores for evaluating partner activity and visibility
- Company listing and profile management for service providers

## Partner Categories

- Contract Development and Manufacturing Organisations (CDMOs)
- Contract Research Organisations (CROs)
- Regulatory Affairs Consultancies
- Clinical Trial Management
- Drug Delivery Technology Platforms
- Formulation Development
- Analytical and Bioanalytical Services
- API and Synthetic Chemistry
- Packaging and Serialisation
- Digital Health and AI Platforms
- Licensing and Business Development

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2003 (as The Pharma Services Directory)
- Platform: thepartnershiptree.com
- Parent organisation: The Pharma Services Directory (pharmaservicesdirectory.com)
- Coverage: Global, with strength in Europe and North America
- Contact: paul@thepartnershiptree.com

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is The Partnership Tree?
A: The Partnership Tree is an AI-powered life sciences partner network and the parent platform of The Pharma Services Directory, established in 2003. It helps pharmaceutical, biotech and medtech companies find and connect with CDMOs, CROs, regulatory consultancies, technology platforms and other specialist service partners.

Q: What types of partnerships can I find?
A: The platform covers two main categories. Technology and Platform Partnerships include AI-enabled drug discovery, biomarker testing, connected clinical trial networks, synthetic biology platforms, and digital health tools. Service and Commercial Partnerships include CDMO manufacturing agreements, CRO clinical research contracts, regulatory consultancy engagements, licensing deals, and co-development agreements.

Q: How is this different from a traditional pharmaceutical directory?
A: Traditional directories are static listings. The Partnership Tree combines a curated, actively maintained directory with AI-powered search, live partnership deal tracking, and structured partner intelligence — making it a dynamic partnering tool rather than a passive reference.

Q: How do I find a CDMO or CRO?
A: Use the AI-powered search on the homepage. Try queries like "injectable CDMO Europe", "Phase I CRO oncology", or "regulatory consultancy EU MDR" to find relevant partners quickly.

Q: How do I get my company listed?
A: Visit thepartnershiptree.com and click Join, or contact paul@thepartnershiptree.com directly.

## Optional: Full Company Catalogue

For a full list of companies in the network, visit: https://thepartnershiptree.com/#directory
